parameters.name: Organization Name
parameters.description: The name of the Organization. This can be found in the instance URL i.e. {Organization}.visualstudio.com. The Organization should have "Third-party application access via OAuth" enabled to prevent errors in the operation.

parameters.name: Project Name
parameters.description: Project ID or project name

parameters.name: Work Item Type
parameters.description: The work item type of the work item.

parameters.name: Work Item Id
parameters.description: Id of a work item.

parameters.name: Link Type
parameters.description: Relation type for the link. Defaults to 'System.LinkTypes.Related' when omitted.

parameters.name: Target URL
parameters.description: Absolute URL of the link target. Must be an absolute URI and match the expectations for the selected Link Type.

parameters.name: Comment
parameters.description: Optional comment stored alongside the link.

returns.raw: The outputs of this operation are dynamic.

parameters.name: Organization Name
parameters.description: The name of the Organization. This can be found in the instance URL i.e. {Organization}.visualstudio.com. The Organization should have "Third-party application access via OAuth" enabled to prevent errors in the operation.

parameters.name: Project Name
parameters.description: The name of the project within the specified Organization.

parameters.name: Release Definition Id
parameters.description: The identifier of the release definition to use.

parameters.name: Description
parameters.description: The description of the release start metadata.

parameters.name: Is Draft
parameters.description: Specifies whether the release is a draft.

parameters.name: Reason
parameters.description: The reason for the release start metadata.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The name of the configuration variable.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The value of the configuration variable.

returns.raw:
Release
- Body
- Release

parameters.name: Organization Name
parameters.description: The name of the Organization. This can be found in the instance URL i.e. {Organization}.visualstudio.com. The Organization should have "Third-party application access via OAuth" enabled to prevent errors in the operation.

parameters.name: Project Name
parameters.description: The name of the project within the specified Organization.

parameters.name: Work Item Type
parameters.description: Type of this work item

parameters.name: Return all fields
parameters.description: When setting the value to 'No', only the work item ID will be returned. If the value is 'Yes', all fields of the created Item along with the ID will be returned. The default value is 'Yes'

parameters.name: Work Item Details
parameters.description: Information to include in the new work item

returns.raw: The outputs of this operation are dynamic.

HttpRequest.displayName: Send an HTTP request to Azure DevOps

parameters.name: Organization Name
parameters.description: The name of the Organization. This can be found in the instance URL i.e. {Organization}.visualstudio.com. The Organization should have "Third-party application access via OAuth" enabled to prevent errors in the operation.

parameters.name: Method
parameters.description: The HTTP method.

parameters.name: Relative URI
parameters.description: The relative URI. Example: {project}/{team}/_apis/wit/templates?api-version=5.0-preview.1.

parameters.name: Headers
parameters.description: The request headers.

parameters.name: Body
parameters.description: The request content. Can be JSON object or binary data encoded as Base64 string.

parameters.name: Body is Base64
parameters.description: Must be true if request content is encoded as Base64 string.

returns.raw:
- response
- ObjectWithoutType

parameters.name: Organization Name
parameters.description: The name of the Organization. This can be found in the instance URL i.e. {Organization}.visualstudio.com. The Organization should have "Third-party application access via OAuth" enabled to prevent errors in the operation.

parameters.name: Project Name
parameters.description: The name of the project within the specified Organization.

parameters.name: Search Text
parameters.description: The search text.

parameters.name: Skip
parameters.description: Number of results to be skipped. Defaults to 0.

parameters.name: Top
parameters.description: Number of results to be returned. Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: Filters
parameters.description: Filters to be applied. Set it to null if there are no filters to be applied.

parameters.name: Include Facets
parameters.description: Flag to opt for faceting in the result. Default behavior is false.

parameters.name: Field
parameters.description: Field name on which sorting should be done.

parameters.name: Sort Order
parameters.description: Order (ASC/DESC) in which the results should be sorted.
